benefits.description: Still feels appetite suppressant effect even at low dosage (below 500 mcg)
Increased sweating (enhanced thermogenesis) and fat burning at low dosage

side_effects.description: Elevated heart rate, especially during workouts, first noted at 500 mcg dose
Full/bloated feeling, different from Terz nausea feeling

protocol_notes: Microdosing every other day with 100-250 mcg due to disliking high dose effects. First dose was 500 mcg. Also used Terz previously and personally prefers Terz. Wife had similar experience with elevated heart rate. Sleep not affected at low dosage.
